title: METEO
summary: Real-time weather app built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, and shadcn/ui for current conditions, 7-day forecasts, and interactive map insights.
overview: METEO is a weather experience focused on speed and clarity. It combines live current weather, multi-day forecasting, and map-based context in a single responsive interface so users can quickly understand local conditions and upcoming changes.
highlights: Current weather conditions with quick visual context.
Forecast weather and temperature for the next 7 days.
Interactive map with weather-related data layers.
